code.title: SvelteKit Route Conventions
items: Use file-based routing in the src/routes/ directory
Export load functions from +page.server.ts for server-side data fetching
Export load functions from +page.ts for universal (shared) data fetching
Use +layout.svelte and +layout.server.ts for shared layout and data

code.title: Svelte Component Conventions
items: Use Svelte stores for shared reactive state
Prefer $state and $derived runes (Svelte 5) over legacy reactive declarations
Use TypeScript in .svelte files with <script lang="ts">
Keep components small and focused; extract reusable logic into .svelte.ts files

testing.title: SvelteKit Testing
items: Use Playwright for end-to-end tests via @playwright/test
Test load functions and form actions as plain async functions
